name: pedal-bench-workspace
description: Workspace scripts for pedal-bench (runs in PowerShell, cmd, bash, zsh).

scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: node scripts/setup-venv.mjs && node scripts/run-venv-python.mjs -m pip install --upgrade pip && node scripts/run-venv-python.mjs -m pip install -e backend[dev]
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
